[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-process" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

How It Works

A Simple, Guided Process

Get your platform built and ready to launch in four straightforward steps.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_4,1_4,1_4,1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

01

Book Your Consultation

We start with a call to understand your goals and determine the right setup for your platform.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

02

Submit Your Materials

Provide your content, links, and assets so we can begin building your platform.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

03

Build & Review

We build your site with you, review it together, and make revisions based on your package.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" text_orientation="center" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

04

Launch Your Platform

Your site is finalized, delivered, and ready for you to manage and grow.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
